subcodes.first_line: The water of life is the divine utterance, and likewise His clear evidences. Strive ye, that perchance the peoples of the world from this heavenly stream [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آب زندگانی بیان الهی است و همچنین بیناتش جهد نمائید شاید اهل عالم از این کوثر
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @the power of words; of speech, @unity; oneness of humanity, @love of God
